coupon.source_phrase_block: ELECTRONIC PASS - Library ID: 77558 • This coupon allows 50% for discounted admission for up to 4 people off the regular admission price to the New England Aquarium. • Only applies to adult and child pricing. • This is not a ticket. It is an electronic discount. • Redeem this discount by showing the email you will be sent when you make your reservation at the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth. Please note the Library ID (77558) above. • Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
